description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/. Add a before_script that runs docker info, installs py-pip and make via apk, and installs docker-compose with pip. Define three stages: build, test, and cleanup. In the build stage add a build:all job that runs make build. In the test stage add test:backend and test:frontend jobs that depend on build:all and run make test_backend and make test_frontend respectively. Add a cleanup_job in the cleanup stage that always runs (when: always) and executes make down.
